purpose: Public interactive AI-in-action experience: a localized animated walkthrough of role-scoped facts, risk detection, evidence-led explanation, a prepared next step, granular feedback and explicit human confirmation, linked from the homepage AI status block.
forbiddenCapabilities: claims that public mode accesses account or real-deal data
external model calls from the public demonstration
automatic or background phone calls without explicit user action
invented legal conclusions or integration status
guaranteed risk prevention or guaranteed business outcomes
presenting demonstrative confirmation as a real transaction mutation
